    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    I

    ImportExportService - Class in model
    Service used to import and export a complete map in binary format.
    ImportExportService - Class in service
    Service used to import and export a complete map in binary format, and to import medical sites in bulk from a CSV file.
    ImportExportService() - Constructor for class model.ImportExportService
     
    ImportExportService() - Constructor for class service.ImportExportService
     
    importMap(String) - Method in class model.ImportExportService
    Imports a complete map model from a binary file.
    importMap(String) - Method in class service.ImportExportService
     
    importMedicalSitesFromCsv(MapModel, String) - Method in class service.ImportExportService
    Imports medical sites from a CSV file.
    IN_MISSION - Enum constant in enum class model.enums.DroneStatus
     
    IN_PROGRESS - Enum constant in enum class model.enums.MissionStatus
     
    isAnimating() - Method in class ui.MapCanvas
    Returns true if drone animation is currently running.
    isAvailable() - Method in class model.Drone
    Returns true if this drone is available for a mission.
    isReceptionConfirmed() - Method in class model.Mission
    Returns true if the hospital has confirmed reception of the organ.
